zh.lifeSummary: 當Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich於1151年4月10日出生在俄羅斯Новгородская ОбластьВеликий Новгород諾福格洛德諾福格洛德時，他的父親Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik73歲，母親Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod36歲。他於大約1169年與Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik在烏克蘭Івано-ФранківськаГалицький район結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1202年享年51歲。

zh-hans.Novgorod, Novgorod, velikiy novgorod, No: 俄罗斯Новгородская ОбластьВеликий Новгород諾福格洛德諾福格洛德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich于1151年4月10日出生在俄罗斯Новгородская ОбластьВеликий Новгород諾福格洛德諾福格洛德时，他的父亲Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik73岁，母亲Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod36岁。他于大约1169年与Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik在乌克兰Івано-ФранківськаГалицький район结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1202年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Igor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant form of   Ivor  , one of the names taken to Russia at the time of the first Scandinavian settlement of Kiev in the 9th century. In the English-speaking world it is a 20th-century borrowing.

nameMeanings.name: Yurij
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual Russian form of   George  , also used occasionally in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich was born on 10 April 1151, in Novgorod, Novgorod, velikiy novgorod, Novgorod Oblast, Russia, his father, Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik, was 73 and his mother, Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod, was 36. He married Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik about 1169, in Halych, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1202, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich est né le 10 avril 1151, à Novgorod, Novgorod, velikiy novgorod, Novgorodskaya Oblast', Russie, son père, Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik, avait 73 ans et sa mère, Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik environ 1169, à Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1202, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich am 10. April 1151 in Novgorod, Novgorod, velikiy novgorod, Novgorodskaya Oblast', Russland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik 73 und seine Mutter Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod 36. Er hat um 1169 in Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1202 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich è nato il il 10 aprile 1151 nel Novgorod, Novgorod, velikiy novgorod, Novgorodskaya Oblast', Russia, il suo padre, Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik, aveva 73 anni e il suo madre, Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik circa 1169, nel Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucraina. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1202, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich(이)가 1151년 4월 10일 러시아 Новгородская Область Великий Новгород 노브고로드 노브고로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik(은)는 73세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1169년 우크라이나 Івано-Франківська Галицький район에서 Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1202년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich nasceu em 10 de abril de 1151, em Novgorod, Novgorod, velikiy novgorod, Novgorodskaya Oblast', Rússia, seu pai, Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik, tinha 73 anos e sua mãe, Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik aproximadamente 1169, em Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrânia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1202, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich родился 10 апреля 1151 г. в местности новгород, новгород, Великий Новгород, Новгородская Область, Россия, его отцу по имени Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik было 73 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Ekaterina of Novgorod, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik около 1169 г. в местности Галицкий район, Ивано-Франковская, Украина. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1202 г. в возрасте 51 год.
